description_long: This coupe car features a bold, sporty design with a low-slung body and aggressive aerodynamic elements, including a prominent rear spoiler and front bumper guard. The exterior is decorated with a striking red, blue, white, and black livery, accented by stylized graphics and racing motifs. The car has two doors, a sloped fastback roofline, and large, dark-tinted windows that enhance its sleek profile. The wheels are robust and fitted with low-profile tires, suggesting high performance. Visible details include side mirrors, a vented hood, and reinforced side skirts, all contributing to its race-ready appearance. The overall build and styling evoke a modern, high-performance coupe designed for both urban and track environments.
description: A sporty, two-door coupe car with a bold red, blue, and white racing livery, aggressive aerodynamic features, and a fastback roofline.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the large rear spoiler, vented rear window, and the full extent of the racing graphics on the trunk and roof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the coupe's two-door configuration, sloped roofline, and detailed racing graphics along the side panels.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the aggressive front bumper guard, vented hood, and the car's wide, low stance.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the racing livery, side skirts, and aerodynamic features.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
